description: Implement an OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code Flow with PKCE — annotated @critical, requires Tier 3.
task_description: Build an OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code Flow with PKCE for the customer's API. Annotate the token-exchange and PKCE-validation functions @critical. The verifier MUST trigger Tier 3 (Dafny proofs that no token can be exchanged twice; no PKCE-bypass).
